Welcome.name: Jean-Christophe Fontaine
Welcome.description: I create modern and high-performance web applications.

aboutMe.title: WHO AM I?
aboutMe.passion: <important>Jean-Christophe</important>, a web developer passionate about computer science and modern technologies.
aboutMe.reconversion: After more than ten years of experience in luxury hospitality internationally, I undertook a professional career change in 2022 to fully dedicate myself to web development. Graduated <important>Web & Mobile Web Developer</important>, then <important>Application Developer (DevOps option)</important>, I combine rigor, service orientation, and technical skills.
aboutMe.experience: I worked as a front-end developer at the digital agency <important>Osmova (French Tech)</important> and at <important>Exaprint</important>, where I contributed to innovative projects and digital transformation.
aboutMe.dsio: Today, based on <important>Réunion Island</important>, where part of my roots lie, I joined the <important>Information Systems and Organization Department</important> of the <important>Regional Council of Réunion</important>, participating in high-stakes organizational and institutional digital projects.

conceptionDescription.step1: Design begins with a functional analysis of requirements using use case and activity diagrams. These diagrams help lay the project's foundation by identifying actors, objectives, user journeys, and business processes.
conceptionDescription.step2: Once the requirements are clarified, I use UML diagrams to design a clear and modular application architecture, particularly through class, component, and package diagrams. For database design, I also apply the <important>Merise</important> methodology using ERD and relational models.
conceptionDescription.step3: Sequence, communication, state-transition, and object diagrams allow me to model interactions between services, application flows, and system behavior.
conceptionDescription.step4: Finally, deployment and global interaction diagrams represent the infrastructure, environments, containers, and service dependencies, in a <important>DevOps</important>-oriented approach focused on deployment and maintainability.

backendDescription.step1: I design and develop robust applications and <important>REST APIs</important> in <important>Node.js</important> and <important>TypeScript</important> environments, favoring modular, maintainable, and high-performance architectures.
backendDescription.step2: I implement secure services with authentication management, data validation, and clear organization of routes and business layers.
backendDescription.step3: For data persistence, I use relational databases like <important>MySQL</important> or NoSQL such as <important>MongoDB</important>, as well as ORMs like <important>Sequelize</important> to ensure code consistency, maintainability, and scalability.
backendDescription.step4: Depending on project needs, I can also work in <important>PHP</important> for maintaining or evolving existing applications.
backendDescription.step5: I work in containerized environments with <important>Docker</important>, ensuring reproducibility, portability, and reliable deployments in a <important>DevOps</important>-oriented approach.

frontendDescription.step1: I design modern, high-performance, and accessible interfaces with a strong focus on <important>JavaScript</important>, particularly <important>React</important>.
frontendDescription.step2: During my experience at <important>Exaprint</important>, I contributed to the evolution of an e-commerce site by developing new features based on behavioral analysis via <important>ContentSquare</important> and <important>A/B tests</important>, mainly using <important>React</important>, <important>TypeScript</important>, and <important>GraphQL</important> in an Agile environment.
frontendDescription.step3: I pay particular attention to performance, accessibility, and user experience to provide smooth and intuitive interfaces.
frontendDescription.step4: I am also proficient in integrating <important>Figma</important> mockups, responsive design, and modular front-end architectures. I have also worked with <important>Vue.js</important> and <important>Pinia</important> for state management.
frontendDescription.step5: My goal is to create fast, maintainable, and enjoyable web applications, closely aligned with business needs and user experience.

qualitySecurity.title: Quality & Security
qualitySecurity.text:
Continuous code analysis with <important>SonarQube</important> to detect bugs, vulnerabilities, and bad practices.

Application of <important>OWASP</important> best practices to strengthen application security and prevent common vulnerabilities.

ciCd.title: CI/CD & Automation
ciCd.text:
Implementation of CI/CD pipelines with <important>GitLab CI/CD</important> and <important>Jenkins</important> to automate tests, builds, and deployments.

Objective: fast, reliable, and reproducible deliveries.

monitoring.title: Monitoring & Observability
monitoring.text:
Supervision of services and infrastructures using <important>Prometheus</important> and <important>Grafana</important> for real-time monitoring.

Setup of alerts and dashboards to anticipate incidents.

architecture.title: Architecture & Orchestration
architecture.text:
Microservices architecture and orchestration concepts with <important>Kubernetes</important> for scalable, resilient applications adapted to cloud environments.

Containerization with <important>Docker</important> to ensure portability and deployment consistency.

contact.subtitle: Always available to answer your questions!
